title: Area SEND inspections and outcomes in England: management information 2024 to 2025
body: "Management information for area SEND, showing inspection outcomes for the spring and summer terms in the 2024 to 2025 academic year. This includes all inspection outcomes up to 31 August 2025.  These figures are not official statistics.               Area SEND inspections and outcomes in England: management information summer term 2024 to 2025    ODS, 43.8 KB     This file is in an OpenDocument format                 Area SEND inspections and outcomes in England: management information spring term 2024 to 2025    ODS, 41.5 KB     This file is in an OpenDocument format    "

taxons.title: Special educational needs and disability (SEND) and high needs
